content.speakerText: Welcome aboard! I'm Lisa, your HR rep. You're gonna love it here.
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎加入！我是HR丽莎，你会喜欢这儿的。
expectedAnswers: Thanks, Lisa! I'm really excited to get started.
It's great to be here—thank you for the warm welcome!
Thank you so much! I can't wait to begin.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应欢迎并表达感激
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气真诚积极
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'excited', 'welcome' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We've got a quick orientation today—just the basics to help you settle in.
content.speakerTextCn: 今天我们会快速过一下入职流程，帮你快速适应。
expectedAnswers: That sounds good—I just want to make sure I don't miss anything.
Perfect! I'm ready to learn everything.
Got it—I appreciate you taking the time to guide me.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达配合意愿或积极态度
语言准确性：句型结构完整，动词搭配正确
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场新人身份
关键词覆盖：使用了 'learn', 'orientation', 'settle in' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Welcome to the team! We’re excited to have you with us.
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎加入团队！我们很期待你的加入。
expectedAnswers: Thank you! I'm honored to join and eager to contribute.
Thanks so much—I’m looking forward to working with everyone and learning the ropes.
I really appreciate it! I’m ready to dive in and get up to speed quickly.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并展现积极融入的态度
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词和短语（e.g., 'contribute', 'learn the ropes', 'get up to speed')
表达自然度：语气真诚、有层次，避免机械重复
关键词覆盖：使用了 'team', 'contribute', 'learn', 'welcome' 等场景关键词
